name: CREATE_AGENT: Haa dont delete any agent

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: Haa dont delete any agent" initialized.

result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aapne ek bahut important safety rule add kiya hai: **Koi bhi agent tab tak delete nahi hoga jab tak user explicitly command na kare.**

**🧠 Reasoning:**
Pehle maine jo plan banaya tha, usmein maine ek `Advanced Coding` skill use karne ka suggestion diya tha, jo mere available skills list mein nahi hai. System rules ke hisaab se, main naya skill bana sakti hoon sirf agar woh list mein ho ya agar mujhe uske liye explicit permission mile.

Lekin, aapka naya constraint (safety first) bahut valid hai. Isko handle karne ke liye, main **`confirmation_loop`** skill ka use karungi. Yeh skill hi mere liye sabse best hai kyunki yeh *gatekeeping* ka kaam karta hai.

**🛠️ Revised Plan:**
1.  I will use the **`confirmation_loop`** skill.
2.  I will structure the deletion process so that any attempt to delete an agent will first trigger the `confirmation_loop`.
3.  This loop will force me to ask the user for explicit confirmation *before* executing any deletion command, fulfilling your safety requirement.
4.  I will not create a new skill file, but rather *implement* the deletion logic *through* the existing `confirmation_loop` skill's guardrails.

**💡 Suggestion:**
Kya yeh approach sahi hai? Isse hum naya skill banane ki koshish karne ke bajay, existing, proven safety mechanism ko use kar rahe hain.

Confirm karu?
